headline: The Trade Desk Appoints David Haddad to Board of Directors
summary: VENTURA, Calif., June 09, 2026--Global advertising technology leader The Trade Desk (NASDAQ: TTD) today announced the appointment of David Haddad to its board of directors. A veteran media and entertainment executive, Haddad brings more than three decades of leadership experience building and scaling global businesses across some of the world's most influential media companies.
